title: NEON OVERDRIVE
tagline: Anti-Gravity Racing Game // Environment, Art Direction, Level Design, UI // 2024
description: Neon Overdrive is a high octane, anti-gravity racing game that takes place in the near-future cyberpunk city of Cloud Medina. This game premiered in an exhibition in the German University in Cairo. Original Soundtrack by Ahmed Fouad (MoozMusic)

title: PuppyCat's Quest
tagline: Speedrun Platforming Game // Environment, Animation, Art, Illustration, UI, Development, Level Design // 2023
description: PuppyCat's Quest is a solo game which was inspired by a Netflix original: Bee and PuppyCat. You control PuppyCat and make it through a peaceful environment in this speed-run platformer. This game premiered in an exhibition at the German University in Cairo.

title: Combat Sim VR
tagline: Virtual Reality Combat Training // Environment, Assets, Physics, Development, Level Design, Oculus // 2023
description: Combat Sim VR is a solo project that features fully functional VR integration, physics, and environment. The objective of this project was to experiment with an educational martial arts training environment in VR. Including video game and gamification elements to create a more fun and enjoyable, yet informative experience.
